label: FAIL
rationale: GetACL retrieves the ACL for an existing AccessControl association. MaxRanges=8 supports non-global ranges Range1 through Range8 in addition to the Global Range, so Range9 is outside the established supported range set; returning a successful Locking_Range9 Get ACL is not compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: GetACL returns ACE uidrefs for an existing object/method AccessControl association. With MaxRanges=8, Range9 is beyond the supported non-global ranges; the RangeNNNN K_AES key rows do not make K_AES_256_Range9_Key exist, so a successful Range9 GenKey ACL response is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: MaxRanges=8 supports Range1 through Range8 in addition to the Global Range, so Locking_Range8 is within the established supported range set. The Opal AccessControl preconfiguration maps Locking RangeNNNN Get to ACE_Locking_RangeNNNN_Get_RangeStartToActiveKey plus ACE_Anybody_Get_CommonName, matching the returned ACL.

label: PASS
rationale: MaxRanges=8 places Range8 within the supported non-global range set. For K_AES_256 RangeNNNN GenKey, the AccessControl preconfiguration gives ACE_K_AES_256_RangeNNNN_GenKey, and GetACL returns ACE uidrefs, so ACE_K_AES_256_Range8_GenKey is a compliant exact ACL result.
